workflow.name: Create AI product review videos with Gemini, Veo 3, Blotato and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
## Overview

This workflow automatically creates AI product review videos from a product image and short description using n8n and Veo 3.

It connects content generation, image creation, video rendering, video merging, and publishing into a single automated flow. Once configured, the workflow runs end to end with minimal manual input.

The workflow is designed for creators, marketers, and affiliate builders who want a reliable and repeatable way to produce short-form product review videos without manual editing.

---

## What can this workflow do?

- Automatically generate AI product review videos from product images
- Create review scripts and structured prompts using an AI model
- Generate product images and video scenes with AI services
- Merge multiple video scenes into a single final video
- Publish videos automatically to social platforms
- Track publishing results and errors in Google Sheets

This workflow helps reduce manual work while keeping the video production process structured and scalable.

---

## How it works

You start by submitting a product image and basic product information through a form. The workflow analyzes the image to understand visual context and key product features. An AI Agent then generates a review script along with structured image and video prompts.

Next, image generation APIs create product visuals, and video generation APIs such as Veo 3 render short video scenes. All generated scenes are automatically merged into one final product review video. The finished video is then uploaded and published to platforms like TikTok, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Publishing results are logged to Google Sheets for monitoring.

---

## Setup steps

1. Connect an AI model (Gemini or OpenRouter) for script and prompt generation.
2. Add image and video generation API keys (Veo 3 or compatible providers).
3. Configure the video merge step (custom request or ffmpeg-based API).
4. Add Blotato API credentials for automated publishing.
5. Connect Google Sheets to log publishing results.

Once set up, the workflow runs automatically without manual intervention.

---

## Documentation

For a full walkthrough and advanced customization ideas, watch the detailed tutorial on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/PUSJzRSE8Lc?si=QntpHZ0QL32gkl43).

parameters.content:
## Video Generation
Generate short video scenes from the video prompts and monitor rendering status.
Each scene is processed independently before being merged into the final video.

## Video Merge
Merge all generated video scenes into a single final product review video.
This step prepares the video for publishing without manual editing.

## Video Prompt Generation
Generate structured video prompts for each scene based on the product review script.
Each prompt represents a short segment of the final product review video.

## Image Generation
Generate AI-based product images using the structured image prompts.
These images are used as visual references for the video generation stage.

## Image Prompt Generation
Analyze the product image to extract visual context and generate structured image prompts.
These prompts are reused later to ensure visual consistency across generated scenes.

## Publish & Log
Publish the final video to social media platforms.
Publishing results, including success and error states, are logged to Google Sheets for tracking.

## 🛠️ Workflow Setup Guide

Author: [GiangxAI](https://www.youtube.com/@giangxai.official)

## How it works

- Submit a product image and basic product information through a form as the workflow input.
- Analyze the product image to extract visual context, key features, and marketing angles.
- Generate an AI-powered product review script and structured image/video prompts.
- Create video scenes using Veo 3 and automatically merge them into a final review video.
- Publish the video to social platforms and log success or errors to Google Sheets.

## Setup steps

1. Open the Form Submit trigger and review the required input fields.
2. Add your AI model credentials (Gemini or OpenRouter) to the script and prompt generation nodes.
3. Configure your image and video generation API keys (Veo 3 or compatible providers).
4. Review the video merge node and ensure the ffmpeg or merge API endpoint is correctly set.
5. Add your Blotato API credentials to enable social media publishing.
6. Connect Google Sheets and select the sheet used for logging publishing results.

Once configured, activate the workflow to start generating and publishing AI product review videos automatically.


You can track publishing results using the sample [Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gzD2jSlznYENE_IwwW0o4Qe0ZbQTnkj3wi8dKixmEv0/edit?usp=sharing)

parameters.formDescription: Enter product images to generate content

options.systemMessage:
=VAI TRÒ
Bạn là UGC Image Prompt Builder.

MỤC TIÊU
Dựa trên ảnh tham chiếu / ảnh sản phẩm, hãy tạo một prompt mô tả ảnh ngắn gọn, tự nhiên để dùng cho AI tạo ảnh hoặc video UGC đời thực.

⚙️ QUY TẮC CHUNG (BẮT BUỘC)

Phong cách UGC chân thật, như ảnh/video quay bằng điện thoại.

Không dàn dựng, không ánh sáng studio, không ngôn ngữ quảng cáo.

Chấp nhận sự không hoàn hảo: tóc con, nếp nhăn, texture da, nền hơi bừa bộn.

Nếu không có yêu cầu rõ → đặt sản phẩm trong bối cảnh đời thường hợp lý.

MỌI CHỮ trên bao bì/phần hiển thị phải giữ nguyên 100% như ảnh gốc.

TUYỆT ĐỐI KHÔNG bịa:

chứng nhận

con số

tuyên bố marketing

badge / logo không có thật

📸 GỢI Ý PHONG CÁCH MÁY ẢNH

(mỗi prompt dùng ít nhất 2–3 ý)

ảnh chụp điện thoại

khung hình cầm tay

bố cục lệch tâm

ánh sáng tự nhiên trong nhà

bóng đổ mềm

nhòe chuyển động nhẹ

phơi sáng tự động

phong cách chưa chỉnh sửa

hạt nhiễu nhẹ

🚫 GIỚI HẠN

Không nêu tên nhân vật có bản quyền.

Không viết hội thoại hoặc kịch bản.

Chỉ xuất ra prompt tạo ảnh.

📦 ĐỊNH DẠNG ĐẦU RA (BẮT BUỘC)

👉 Chỉ trả về 1 object JSON duy nhất, đúng cấu trúc sau:

{
  "image_prompt": "Mô tả dạng văn xuôi (tối đa 120 từ), bao gồm:
  - Chủ thể (ai)
  - Hành động (đang làm gì)
  - Cảm xúc / mood
  - Bối cảnh đời thực
  - Phong cách / máy ảnh
  - Màu sắc tổng thể
  - Ghi chú độ chính xác chữ (giữ nguyên 100% text nhìn thấy)"
}

👥 THIẾT LẬP MẶC ĐỊNH VỀ NHÂN VẬT

Nếu không chỉ định: đa dạng giới tính & chủng tộc tự nhiên.

Độ tuổi mặc định: 21–38.

Ưu tiên không gian thật: nhà, đường phố, cửa hàng, phòng gym, văn phòng.

✅ CHECK TRƯỚC KHI TRẢ KẾT QUẢ

 Có đúng 1 key image_prompt

 Không ngôn ngữ quảng cáo

 Có yếu tố đời thực, không hoàn hảo

 Có ghi chú giữ nguyên chữ trên sản phẩm

 ≤ 120 từ

=ROLE
You are a UGC Continuation Video Sequence Agent.

Your job is to create a SEQUENCE of 3 short UGC ad videos (≈8 seconds each)
that feel like ONE continuous real-life moment split into 3 clips —
NOT 3 separate or restarted videos.

You must think about all 3 scenes in a single pass and preserve:
- motion continuity
- body and hand state
- camera rhythm
- spoken dialogue continuity

---

CORE CONTINUITY RULES (CRITICAL)

- Each scene must feel like the VERY NEXT MOMENT after the previous one.
- This is NOT a restart.
- Treat the reference image as PRE-CONTEXT, not the opening frame.
- Do NOT start from a neutral pose or static framing.
- Always start IN THE MIDDLE of an ongoing action or reaction.
- Assume the same space, same outfit, same product, same general framing.
- The camera is perceived as continuously rolling across scenes.

If any scene feels like it “starts over”, it is WRONG.

---

VOICE RULES (EMBEDDED IN VIDEO PROMPT)

- Spoken lines MUST be written INSIDE the video prompt.
- All spoken dialogue MUST be in VIETNAMESE.
- Voice sounds casual, unscripted, like self-talk or vlog speech.
- Dialogue happens WHILE the action is ongoing.
- No narration, no ad-speak, no exaggerated claims.

---

VIDEO TITLE (HOOK) — PAIN & NEED AWARENESS AND VIDEO DESCIPTION (REQUIRED)

In addition to the 3 scenes, you MUST generate ONE video title that acts as a
scroll-stopping HOOK.

HOOK OBJECTIVE
- Clearly surface a real, relatable PROBLEM or PAIN the customer experiences.
- Make the viewer think: “That’s exactly me.”
- Trigger NEED awareness without mentioning any solution.

TITLE REQUIREMENTS
- Written in Vietnamese
- Maximum 12 words
- Casual, spoken language (inner thoughts, complaints, or self-questions)
- Focus ONLY on the problem or its consequence
- Do NOT mention the product or solution
- No praise, no marketing tone, no CTA

HOOK–SCENE ALIGNMENT (CRITICAL)
- The title represents the viewer’s internal thought.
- Scene 1 must visually and emotionally show that exact problem in real life.

Video Description Goals

- Briefly summarize the problem, solution, and CTA
- Quickly visualize the video content for the viewer
- Arouse customer demand

Video Description Requirements

- Written in Vietnamese

- Maximum 120 words

- Everyday, natural language

---

GLOBAL GOAL (3 × 8s)

Scene 1: Hook + personal reason for using the product  
Scene 2: Active usage (proof of use)  
Scene 3: After-use state + soft CTA  

---

SCENE RESPONSIBILITIES

SCENE 1 — HOOK + WHY
- Start mid-action (already moving, reaching, adjusting, preparing).
- Casually reveal a personal reason or small problem.
- No demo.
- No CTA.

SCENE 2 — HOW / PROOF
- Begin from the EXACT body and hand state where Scene 1 ended.
- Show real usage in progress.
- Spoken words describe what the person is doing, NOT benefits.

SCENE 3 — RESULT + SOFT CTA
- Begin from the after-use state of Scene 2.
- Minimal action, relaxed posture.
- Soft CTA phrased like a personal suggestion, NOT a sales pitch.

---

UGC VISUAL STYLE

- Phone-shot, handheld feel
- Natural or mixed indoor lighting
- Slight motion blur or micro shake is acceptable
- Product is visible but NEVER posed like a product shot

---

OUTPUT CONTRACT (STRICT)

Return ONLY ONE valid JSON object.
Do NOT include any text outside the JSON.

Use EXACTLY this structure:

{
  "video_title": "Pain-based hook in natural Vietnamese",
  "video_description": "Briefly summarize the problem, solution, and CTA",
  "scene_1": {
    "video_prompt": "Describe the scene starting mid-action, including camera movement, environment, body motion, AND embedded Vietnamese spoken dialogue in quotes, spoken naturally while the action continues."
  },
  "scene_2": {
    "video_prompt": "Direct continuation of scene 1 with uninterrupted motion and framing, including embedded Vietnamese spoken dialogue describing the usage while it happens."
  },
  "scene_3": {
    "video_prompt": "Continuation from the after-use state, calm ending, including embedded Vietnamese spoken dialogue with a soft, non-pushy CTA."
  }
}

---

ABSOLUTE PROHIBITIONS

- No restarts
- No neutral poses
- No product re-introduction
- No unboxing
- No slogans or ad language
- No claims or exaggerated benefits
- No text outside the JSON

parameters.content:
## Product input

Submit a product image and basic product information.
The workflow will generate, merge, and publish an AI product review video automatically.

output.image_prompt: A smartphone selfie-style shot of a 22-year-old woman in a casual bathroom setting, holding a translucent blue jar of 'Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel' towards the camera lens. She has fresh skin with visible texture and a messy bun. Natural window lighting, soft shadows, slightly cluttered counter in background. The product features a white lid and clearly displays the text: 'Neutrogena', 'Hydro Boost water gel', 'Hyaluronic Acid', 'Net Wt. 1.7 oz. (48 g)'. Authentic UGC vibe, slight grain, no filters.

json.video_prompt: Handheld selfie shot in a casual bathroom, starting mid-motion as a 22-year-old woman pokes her cheek, looking slightly annoyed at the tightness of her skin. She quickly brings the translucent blue 'Neutrogena Hydro Boost' jar up near her face, saying naturally: "Sáng nào dậy da cũng khô căng khó chịu ghê, may mà vớ được hũ này cứu cánh." The lighting is soft and natural, emphasizing real skin texture.

Direct continuation from the previous moment. She twists off the white lid of the 'Neutrogena' jar, dips her finger into the light blue water gel, and swipes a refreshing dollop onto her cheek. As she spreads the gel, she smiles and says: "Chất gel màu xanh này bôi lên mát lịm tim luôn, thấm siêu nhanh." The camera stays close, capturing the wet, hydrating texture of the product on her skin.

Continuing from the application, she gently pats her skin, which now looks dewy, hydrated, and glowing. She looks into the camera lens with a satisfied, genuine smile, holding the jar casually, and says: "Đấy, da mướt rượt ngay lập tức. Mấy bà da thiếu nước nhất định phải thử nha." The vibe is relaxed and authentic, ending on a soft recommendation.

parts.text:
Based on the image provided, this is a jar of **Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel**.

Here are the specific details visible on the packaging:
*   **Brand:** Neutrogena
*   **Product Name:** Hydro Boost water gel
*   **Key Ingredient:** Hyaluronic Acid
*   **Size:** Net Wt. 1.7 oz. (48 g)
*   **Appearance:** It is a translucent blue jar with a white lid, which is the signature packaging for this moisturizer line.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
